entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop, Cicer arietinum, specifically the desi type in this study.

entities.name: LEAF NECROSIS
entities.description: A condition characterized by the drying of leaflet margins to complete leaflets of older leaves.

entities.name: ICC15566
entities.description: A glabrous mutant accession of desi chickpea.

entities.name: NEC
entities.description: A single recessive gene that governs the leaf necrosis characteristic.

entities.name: GL
entities.description: A gene locus associated with glabrous shoots.

entities.name: GLABROUS SHOOTS
entities.description: A morphological trait where shoots lack hairs.

entities.name: SLV
entities.description: A gene locus associated with simple leaves.

entities.name: SIMPLE LEAVES
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by simple leaf structure.

entities.name: MLV
entities.description: A gene locus associated with multipinnate leaves.

entities.name: MULTIPINNATE LEAVES
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by multipinnate leaf structure.

entities.name: NLV
entities.description: A gene locus associated with narrow leaflets.

entities.name: NARROW LEAFLETS
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by narrow leaflets.

entities.name: HG
entities.description: A gene locus associated with prostrate growth habit.

entities.name: PROSTRATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by a prostrate growth habit.

entities.name: P
entities.description: A gene locus associated with pink corolla.

entities.name: PINK COROLLA
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by pink corolla color.

entities.name: SHP
entities.description: A gene locus associated with round seed shape.

entities.name: ROUND SEED SHAPE
entities.description: A morphological trait characterized by round seed shape.

entities.name: CROSSES
entities.description: The method of breeding ICC15566 with desi type accessions to study inheritance.
